sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_time_zone (event_time DateTime, location String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_time;
SELECT event_time, timeZoneOffset(event_time) AS offset_seconds FROM test_time_zone;
UPDATE test_time_zone SET event_time = toDateTime('2021-04-21 15:20:30', 'America/Los_Angeles') WHERE location = 'New York';
SELECT event_time, timeZoneOffset(event_time) AS offset_seconds, (offset_seconds / 3600) AS offset_hours FROM test_time_zone WHERE location = 'New York';
